subject: FW: ASU origins proposal
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Lawrence Krauss [mailto:krauss@case.edu] 
Sent: Sunday, June 22, 2008 6:34 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Lawrence Krauss
Subject: ASU origins proposal



For Jeffrey:

Hi.. here is what I have confidentially passed around at ASU..it will be
vetted by various people there of course, and name added on..  you  
said you knew someone very good out there, correct?   Let me know who...

What I would like to do is get some leading gift that has to be matched
by the University.. They have a fund that I think could do  
this..   so.. can
we talk?
